No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course syllabus links to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly mentions learning '表達身體不適的用語' (expressions for physical discomfort), which is a minimal, direct link to basic health communication.

Quality Education.reason: The course is tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters 'appreciation of diverse cultures' (Target 4.7). Language skills also provide 'relevant skills' (Target 4.4).
evidence: 本課程為學習土耳其語之入門基礎課程
